## Meeting Purpose

[Explore Fireflies.ai as a potential replacement for Fathom, addressing GrowthX's meeting transcription and note-taking needs.](https://fathom.video/share/yqBN_qfxCrw-SeVdpkSc-PhszSvKYSMx?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Fireflies offers comprehensive features including API access, MCPs, SSO, and advanced team management](https://fathom.video/share/yqBN_qfxCrw-SeVdpkSc-PhszSvKYSMx?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)
  - [Pricing starts at $39/user/month for Enterprise tier, with potential for custom pricing](https://fathom.video/share/yqBN_qfxCrw-SeVdpkSc-PhszSvKYSMx?tab=summary&timestamp=1872.0)
  - [GrowthX can trial Business tier for free or Enterprise tier at a reduced rate for 2 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/yqBN_qfxCrw-SeVdpkSc-PhszSvKYSMx?tab=summary&timestamp=2007.0)
  - [Some desired features (e.g., group-specific sharing) may require feature requests or workarounds](https://fathom.video/share/yqBN_qfxCrw-SeVdpkSc-PhszSvKYSMx?tab=summary&timestamp=910.0)

## Topics

### Current Challenges with Fathom

  - [Lack of API access and programmatic data retrieval](https://fathom.video/share/yqBN_qfxCrw-SeVdpkSc-PhszSvKYSMx?tab=summary&timestamp=42.0)
  - [Poor search functionality and inaccurate attendee/entity tagging](https://fathom.video/share/yqBN_qfxCrw-SeVdpkSc-PhszSvKYSMx?tab=summary&timestamp=91.0)
  - [Limited note-taking capabilities during recordings](https://fathom.video/share/yqBN_qfxCrw-SeVdpkSc-PhszSvKYSMx?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Difficulties with team call sharing and user management](https://fathom.video/share/yqBN_qfxCrw-SeVdpkSc-PhszSvKYSMx?tab=summary&timestamp=149.0)
  - [Multiple bots joining calls, causing association issues](https://fathom.video/share/yqBN_qfxCrw-SeVdpkSc-PhszSvKYSMx?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)

### Fireflies Features and Capabilities

  - [Cloud-based solution with web and mobile apps (desktop app in development)](https://fathom.video/share/yqBN_qfxCrw-SeVdpkSc-PhszSvKYSMx?tab=summary&timestamp=1092.0)
  - [Comprehensive integrations (80+) including Zoom, Google Meet, and Linear](https://fathom.video/share/yqBN_qfxCrw-SeVdpkSc-PhszSvKYSMx?tab=summary&timestamp=1305.0)
  - [AI-powered summaries, action items, and live meeting assistance](https://fathom.video/share/yqBN_qfxCrw-SeVdpkSc-PhszSvKYSMx?tab=summary&timestamp=1135.0)
  - [Customizable privacy settings and sharing rules](https://fathom.video/share/yqBN_qfxCrw-SeVdpkSc-PhszSvKYSMx?tab=summary&timestamp=712.0)
  - [Super admin role for complete meeting access and control](https://fathom.video/share/yqBN_qfxCrw-SeVdpkSc-PhszSvKYSMx?tab=summary&timestamp=727.0)
  - [Ability to edit transcripts and summaries post-meeting](https://fathom.video/share/yqBN_qfxCrw-SeVdpkSc-PhszSvKYSMx?tab=summary&timestamp=1459.0)

### Team and User Management

  - [Group creation and management for tailored settings](https://fathom.video/share/yqBN_qfxCrw-SeVdpkSc-PhszSvKYSMx?tab=summary&timestamp=788.0)
  - [Granular control over meeting privacy and sharing](https://fathom.video/share/yqBN_qfxCrw-SeVdpkSc-PhszSvKYSMx?tab=summary&timestamp=712.0)
  - [Custom rules for automatic meeting handling based on various criteria](https://fathom.video/share/yqBN_qfxCrw-SeVdpkSc-PhszSvKYSMx?tab=summary&timestamp=884.0)
  - [Admin-level control over default settings and permissions](https://fathom.video/share/yqBN_qfxCrw-SeVdpkSc-PhszSvKYSMx?tab=summary&timestamp=776.0)

### AI and Integration Capabilities

  - [Integration with OpenAI and Claude](https://fathom.video/share/yqBN_qfxCrw-SeVdpkSc-PhszSvKYSMx?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)
  - [Custom AI templates for meeting analysis](https://fathom.video/share/yqBN_qfxCrw-SeVdpkSc-PhszSvKYSMx?tab=summary&timestamp=1255.0)
  - [80+ integrations available, including project management tools](https://fathom.video/share/yqBN_qfxCrw-SeVdpkSc-PhszSvKYSMx?tab=summary&timestamp=1305.0)
  - [API access for custom integrations and data retrieval](https://fathom.video/share/yqBN_qfxCrw-SeVdpkSc-PhszSvKYSMx?tab=summary&timestamp=1305.0)

### Pricing and Trial Options

  - [Enterprise tier: $39/user/month (list price)](https://fathom.video/share/yqBN_qfxCrw-SeVdpkSc-PhszSvKYSMx?tab=summary&timestamp=1872.0)
  - [Custom pricing available for volume (75+ users)](https://fathom.video/share/yqBN_qfxCrw-SeVdpkSc-PhszSvKYSMx?tab=summary&timestamp=1872.0)
  - [Free 2-week trial for Business tier](https://fathom.video/share/yqBN_qfxCrw-SeVdpkSc-PhszSvKYSMx?tab=summary&timestamp=2007.0)
  - [2-week Enterprise trial available at $29.50/user](https://fathom.video/share/yqBN_qfxCrw-SeVdpkSc-PhszSvKYSMx?tab=summary&timestamp=2007.0)
